description: Apologies for the correction, sirs. The pass brief said 'Oko has 1 enriched anchor' but the corpus actually has three: Oko the Trickster (PLST-309), Oko's Accomplices (ELD-310), Oko's Hospitality (ELD-312). All three are part of the Throne of Eldraine planeswalker-deck cycle (deck-exclusives 309-313). Hospitality's flavor is signed '—Oko' AND its art depicts Oko in canonical stag-shapeshift form from the Wildered Quest novella; Accomplices is a name-attribution card depicting Oko's fae court (anchors via the canonical-name attribution test, parallel to the Ral's-<Spell> cycle). That's well over the ≥2 team-rocket/acerola/ral-zarek threshold. Tamiyo node already exists from a prior pass — confirmed both Tamiyo corpus cards (PLST-220, MH3-72) already carry characters: ['tamiyo'] frontmatter, so no Tamiyo work needed in this pass. The fun-fact worth saving for any future Oko-themed lair: the Oko, the Trickster / Oko, Thief of Crowns distinction is the single most common buyer-confusion vector for this character — the precon Trickster (PLST-309 in our corpus) is harmless, the main-set Thief of Crowns (ELD-197, not in our corpus) is the format-warping banned mythic. Any bundle copy that surfaces the meme-Oko has to identify WHICH Oko explicitly. Documented in the node's caveats; flagged here so the bundler agent knows to fend off the conflation in storefront prose.
citations: [MTG Wiki: Throne of Eldraine: The Wildered Quest]
[Wizards of the Coast: November 18, 2019 Banned and Restricted Announcement]
[Scryfall: PLST-309 + ELD-310 + ELD-312 — three corpus prints]
[Know Your Meme: Oko, Thief of Crowns]
other_candidates_considered: Tamiyo node — not created; already exists from prior pass. Both corpus cards already wired via characters: ['tamiyo']. No Tamiyo action needed this pass.

Kellan character node (Oko's half-fae son) — deferred. Multiple printings exist (Kellan, the Fae-Blooded WOE; Kellan, the Kid MOM; Kellan, Daring Traveler OTJ) but none currently in the BBL corpus. Future-node trigger: when any Kellan printing enters the corpus.
Garruk character node (Wildered Quest antagonist-foil to Oko) — deferred. No Garruk printings in the current corpus.
